title: suokoun Paint Wallpaper Scraper Set, 2'', 4'', 6'', 8'' Stainless Steel Paint Scraper Set with Soft Handle, Plastering Tools for Drywall(4 Pack)
features: Premium Material: Constructed with durable stainless steel hardened to HRC 48-52, these scrapers are corrosion-resistant and provide a longer lifespan. Mirror polished for rust resistance and easy cleaning.
Bi-material Handle: The PP&TPR handle offers a comfortable grip, reducing vibration and hand fatigue. The finger guide rail ensures a relaxing and ergonomic experience.

trong Flexibility: The flexible edge of the wallpaper scraper, with a thickness of 1.2mm, is perfect for smoothing work like drywall taping or spackling. The set includes 3 scrapers with different widths to meet various occasions.

Wide Application: This versatile set can be used for filling and smoothing holes or cracks in wood, plaster, and masonry. It is also ideal for scraping away grime, removing paint edges, and spackling.
Different Sizes: The wallpaper scrapers set includes 4 sizes (2inch, 4inch, 6inch, 8inch) to meet your different needs for home wall repair
